Olivia Singing River Health System Patient Record 03/20/2024 Page 12 Assessment Author

patient_summary: Olivia, a 73-year-old female (multiple documents list DOBs with conflict), has diagnoses of mixed dyslipidemia, hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus, and essential hypertension documented. Major recent procedure: colonoscopy with biopsy (02/21/2025, Haroon M.). Key abnormal labs from 07/03/2023 include low Iron 41(L) ug/dL, low IronSaturation 15(L)%, elevated Triglycerides 158(H) mg/dL, VLDL 32(H) mg/dL, and eGFRCKD-EPI 58(L) ml/min/1.73m2. BMP on 07/03/2023 shows Creatinine 0.96 mg/dL, Glucose 94 mg/dL. Multiple care team members documented including PCP Hand, Hoyet A, MD and endocrinology/cardiology consultants. Conflicting demographic and functional status data are present across sources and preserved in conflicts.
